{"id":"project-LICHEN-inym.6","title":"Scale test: Validate density-aware startup","description":"Validate that density-aware startup reduces collision rate at scale.

## Test scenarios
1. 100 nodes simultaneous boot - measure collision rate before/after
2. 300 nodes staggered arrival (30 min window) - verify no storm
3. Mixed density: 50 nodes in range, 50 out of range - verify correct detection

## Metrics to capture
- Time to first TX per node (should be spread over minutes, not seconds)
- Collision rate during first 5 minutes
- Channel utilization during startup vs steady state
- Time to RPL convergence

## Success criteria
- Collision rate during startup < 10% (vs current ~50%+ at 100 nodes)
- No node exceeds duty cycle during startup
- RPL converges within 10 minutes at 100 nodes","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:37.149716Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:37.149716Z","labels":["testing","validation","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-inym","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:37.281478Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:37.395397Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-inym.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T16:53:37.516461Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Scale test updated to validate 100-node staggered first-TX, reduced collisions <10%, RPL convergence metrics
